column18:
Consent Form
You are invited to participate in a research study on consumer decision-making conducted for academic purposes as part of a university research project. Your participation is subject to the following conditions:



1. Voluntary participation: Your participation in this study is entirely voluntary. You may choose not to participate or withdraw from the study at any time without penalty. If you decide to withdraw, your responses will not be used.

2. Time commitment: The survey is expected to take approximately 3–5 minutes to complete.

3. Confidentiality: Your responses will remain completely anonymous. No identifying information will be collected. The data will be used solely for academic research purposes and will be analyzed in aggregate form.

4. Risks and benefits: There are no known risks associated with participation. There is no direct personal benefit to participating in this study.



For more detailed information about the study and your rights as a participant, please click here: Consent Information Sheet 



By clicking “I agree” below, you confirm that:

	You are at least 18 years old.
	You have read and understood the information above.
	You voluntarily agree to participate in this study.



Do you agree to participate?
